contract.stepIntro: Read the summary and terms, then sign digitally. You will pay on the next step only.
contract.clause1: You authorize the business to charge the amount shown for the service or invoice described in this checkout.
contract.clause2: Recurring charges (if any) follow the plan and billing cycle stated in your order until you cancel as described in the cancellation policy.
contract.clause3: Payments are processed by the payment provider; card data may be tokenized on their systems.
contract.clause4: You confirm that you are authorized to use the payment method you provide.
contract.clause5: For refunds, cancellations, and disputes, the cancellation policy and privacy policy linked in the app apply.
contract.enClause1: You authorize the charge of the amount shown for the service or invoice described in this checkout.
contract.enClause2: Any recurring charges follow the stated plan and billing cycle until cancelled in line with the published cancellation policy.
contract.enClause3: Payments are processed by the payment provider; card data may be tokenized on their systems.
contract.enClause4: You confirm you are authorized to use the payment method you provide.
contract.enClause5: Refunds, cancellations, and disputes are governed by the cancellation and privacy policies available in the app.
contract.signatureHint: Sign in the box below (mouse, finger, or stylus).
contract.readCheckbox: I have read and accept the terms above.
contract.savedFail: Could not save your signature. Try again.
